jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at BD India
jsonLd.description:
BD India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BD India:
BD India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BD India!
